screenshot_note: Code-level review — worker timed out on Puppeteer; Bloberto completed analysis from source
previous_review_check: Review #34 had 10 suggestions (3 high, 4 medium, 3 low). Checking which are still unfixed.

suggestions.title: ProgressBar milestone Set never resets — STILL UNFIXED from #34
suggestions.description: milestonesRef = useRef(new Set()) persists across task changes. When a worker completes (progress=100) then starts new task (progress=0), the Set still has {25,50,75,100}, so milestones never flash again. Fix: useEffect that clears the Set when progress drops below 25.

suggestions.title: WORKER_ROLE_COLORS duplicates ROLE_COLORS — STILL UNFIXED from #34
suggestions.description: App.jsx has WORKER_ROLE_COLORS keyed by NAME with diverged hex values from ROLE_COLORS in constants.js. Delete WORKER_ROLE_COLORS, use ROLE_COLORS[worker.role] everywhere.

suggestions.title: Clickable characters missing role='button' and keyboard handler — STILL UNFIXED from #34
suggestions.description: Character divs with onClick have tabIndex={0} but no role='button' and no onKeyDown. Screen readers can't interact. Add role='button' and Enter/Space key handler.

suggestions.title: Maya and Dave show progress: 0 despite being active — workers.json stale progress
suggestions.description: Maya and Dave were clocked in at 00:07 but their progress is still 0. Either the Docker workers aren't updating progress, or there's no mechanism to update it. The dashboard shows 0% with spinning typing dots, which looks broken to users. This is a process/tooling issue — workers need to write progress updates to workers.json periodically, or Bloberto needs to estimate progress based on elapsed time.

suggestions.title: Tab hash sync doesn't handle initial load with no hash
suggestions.description: App initializes tab from window.location.hash but doesn't SET the hash on initial load. If user loads the bare URL, hash is empty, tab is 'office', but clicking browser back does nothing because there's no history entry. Set window.location.hash = 'office' on mount.

suggestions.title: ActivityLog time-groups not memoized — STILL UNFIXED from #34
suggestions.description: TIME_GROUP_ORDER.map + filter runs 80 iterations per render cycle (every 60s). Wrap in useMemo keyed on entries array.

suggestions.title: completionToast has no exit animation — STILL UNFIXED from #34
suggestions.description: Toast vanishes abruptly after 3s. Add fade-out CSS transition before unmount.

suggestions.title: Worker card flip animation has no backface-visibility
suggestions.description: WorkerCard has front/back faces but neither .worker-card__front nor .worker-card__back set backface-visibility:hidden. On some browsers, both faces render simultaneously during the flip. Add backface-visibility: hidden to both faces and transform-style: preserve-3d to .worker-card__inner.

suggestions.title: Solo spotlight message hardcoded for 1 worker — doesn't account for Bloberto
suggestions.description: The solo spotlight check (activeWorkers.length === 1) triggers when only Bloberto's manager entry is filtered out and 1 non-manager is active. But it says 'Carrying the whole team on one pair of hands' which is cute — however, it also shows when that single worker is IDLE, which is weird. Should only show when the solo worker is actually working.

suggestions.title: stuckWorkers uses worker.started which can be null — STILL UNFIXED from #34
suggestions.description: Use `w.started || w.updated_at` as fallback. NaN comparison silently skips stuck workers.

suggestions.title: Activity log doesn't show worker emoji for Bloberto/system events
suggestions.description: ActivityLogEntry looks up workerData from roster but Bloberto isn't in the roster array. System events also have no emoji. Add Bloberto to roster or handle the fallback case.
